{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image=Heavy_Exoskeleton.png
|description=With the help of the heavy exoskeleton, even the weakest Snail can pick up extremely heavy things. But if the exoskeleton falls into the water...
|affct=TECH
|hard=RUSH
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=3862
|relic1=Ark Reactor
|relic2=Hawking's Wheelchair
|relic3=Houmuwu Ding
|relic4=Golden Chariot
|relic5=Jade Burial Suit
}}
|color=blue
|earth=3
|water=3
|fire=4
|wind=4
|form=Mecha
|element=Fire
|realm=Koryeo
|orangehard=RUSH
}}
